skill_description: Content extraction and analysis — wisdom extraction from videos, podcasts, articles, and YouTube. USE WHEN extract wisdom, content analysis, analyze content, insight report, analyze video, analyze podcast, extract insights, key takeaways, what did I miss, extract from YouTube.

items.instruction: Unified skill for content extraction and analysis workflows.

| Request Pattern | Route To |
|---|---|
| Extract wisdom, content analysis, insight report, analyze content | `ExtractWisdom/SKILL.md` |

items.concept: Apply ContentAnalysis in a practical project
items.instruction: Demonstrate mastery of ContentAnalysis by completing a project
practice_tasks: Explain when ContentAnalysis should be used
Identify the core concepts of ContentAnalysis
Apply ContentAnalysis to solve a real-world problem

items.instruction: Learn when to apply ContentAnalysis in response to user queries
examples: User asks about web development -> consider using ContentAnalysis
User needs help with coding -> evaluate if ContentAnalysis applies
practice_tasks: Identify keywords that indicate ContentAnalysis is needed
Distinguish between ContentAnalysis and related skills
